.gitignore.general_idea: Explicitly allow the Maven wrapper JAR to be tracked in version control to ensure build reproducibility.
Ignore the logs directory to prevent committing runtime log files.
Ignore environment configuration files to prevent leaking secrets or local configurations.
Remove NetBeans-specific ignore patterns as the project likely no longer uses or supports NetBeans.
Remove the explicit ignore for .war files, relying on the target/ directory exclusion instead.
Reorganize the .gitignore file into logical sections (Logs, OS, IDE, Environment) for better readability.

README.md.general_idea: Update README to reflect the migration from Java Servlets/JSP to Spring Boot 3.2 and ReactJS.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'Backend: Java (Servlets), Jakarta EE' to 'Spring Boot 3.2' and 'Frontend: JSP...' to 'ReactJS + Vite'.

README.md.general_idea: Implicitly update JDK requirement from 17 to 21 to match Spring Boot 3.2 baseline.
README.md.human_impl: Removed explicit 'JDK 17' requirement line, aligning with Spring Boot 3.2 which targets Java 17+ (often 21 in new projects).

README.md.general_idea: Update build instructions from generic Maven/Tomcat deployment to Spring Boot embedded server.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'mvn clean install' and 'start server' with 'mvn spring-boot:run'.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for the new React frontend setup and execution.
README.md.human_impl: Added sections for 'Configuración del Frontend (ReactJS)' and 'npm install' / 'npm run dev' commands.

README.md.general_idea: Update database configuration documentation to use Spring Boot application.properties instead of hardcoded Java files.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced instructions to edit 'conexion.java' with editing 'application.properties' for datasource URL and credentials.

README.md.general_idea: Document the new REST API endpoints and JWT authentication flow.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Endpoints del Backend' section listing POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/empleados, etc.

README.md.general_idea: Document the new monorepo structure separating client and server code.
README.md.human_impl: Added ASCII tree diagram showing 'sisnom-springboot/' with 'client/' and 'src/' directories.

README.md.general_idea: Update user role documentation to match the new security implementation.
README.md.human_impl: Added table defining roles: admin, recursos_humanos, contador, empleado.
